**Ensuring proper JSON format**

I need to clarify that it doesn't forbid an empty array, so I can provide one. I should also mention limitations regarding any changes. It might be useful to include "layer_file_changes": []. I'll make sure there's no prose outside of the JSON format. Keeping everything neat and straightforward will help avoid confusion. It's pretty essential to stick to the expected JSON protocol to ensure that everything functions smoothly!
